shared_specifications.note: The following applies to all standard panel systems (310, 310EB, 312, 314, 410, 412, 631, 632 and combo variants) unless otherwise noted.
shared_specifications.molding_material: 0.062 inch thick 6063 alloy aluminum with T5 temper
fire_ratings: ASTM E84 Class A (fire-rated particleboard core required)
ASTM E84 Class B (standard M2 particleboard core)
shared_specifications.panel_core: Industrial grade M2 particleboard for Class B; fire-rated particleboard for Class A
surface_material_options: High Pressure Decorative Laminate (HPL) — meets NEMA LD3-2005
Custom Graphic High-Pressure Laminate (CHPL) — photographs or graphic images
Wood Veneer — HPVA Architectural Grade A or better, UV coating gloss or satin finish
New Leaf High Performance Veneer — 0.030 inch thick, polyurethane matte or semi-gloss finish
Bulletin Board / Tack Board — linoleum with linseed oil, cork, resin binders on jute backing
Acoustical Panel — 0.5 inch thick 100% polyester fiber, NRC 0.45, ASTM E84 Class A
Marker Board (Dry Erase) — magnetic porcelain enamel steel
installation_methods: Panel mastic (S-bead) over gypsum board or CMU
Construction staples into wood, gypsum board, or wood slats

installation_requirements.cutting_tools: Carbide tools required for field cutting
installation_requirements.face_penetrations: Minimum 1/8 inch (3mm) radius in corners per NEMA LD3-2005
installation_requirements.subwall_flatness: Within 1/8 inch in 10 feet (1/960th of span)
installation_requirements.acclimation: Minimum 48 hours at 60-80°F and 50-60% relative humidity before installation
installation_requirements.moisture_barrier: Plastic film barrier required when paneling is on exterior wall or in wet area

shared_specifications.warranty: 1 year from date of original purchase against defects in materials or workmanship

systems.name: Clicwall Modular Wall Cladding
systems.manufacturer_brand: UNILIN Group, provided by Panel Specialists, Inc.
systems.description: Progressive panel system with no exposed divider molding reveal between vertical panel edges. Uses patented Uniclic tongue-and-groove click system for virtually seamless connections.
systems.surface_material: Durable melamine top layer and balancing melamine back layer, available in 86 colors and decors
systems.connection_system: Uniclic patented tongue-and-groove click system — panels click together with no exposed divider molding

moldings.material: 0.062 inch thick 6063 alloy aluminum with T5 temper
edge_trims_half_inch: #304-90 End Cap for top and bottom of 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for top and bottom of 135 degree outside corner
edge_trims_three_eighths_inch: #604-90 End Cap for top and bottom of 90 degree Outside Corner

technical_data.fire_rating_standard: ASTM E84 Class B (standard) / Class A (FR)

installation_notes: Store flat to avoid warping; acclimate per manufacturer specs before installation
Panels attach with screws, masonry anchors, mastic, or staples
1mm contraction joint per running meter required on all sides; minimum 6mm joint
Extra expansion joint every 8 meters (24-26 feet)

systems.name: System #310
systems.description: Progressive panel system with an exposed divider molding creating a 1/16 inch (1.5mm) horizontal and vertical reveal between edge banded panels.
systems.edge_finish: 0.018 inch (0.5mm) PVC edge banding or wood veneer
divider_moldings: #302a — 1/16 inch (1.5mm) wide Divider Molding
#410 H — Divider Molding for use with marker boards, tack board, and specialty panels
edge_trim_options: #304-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #310EB
systems.description: Progressive panel system with a hidden divider molding and 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused vinyl edge banding on all panel edges, creating a continuous decorative face with a minimal reveal. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.
systems.edge_finish: 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused vinyl edge banding, color coordinated or contrasting

reveals.horizontal: Minimal — 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused edge banding with hidden divider molding
reveals.vertical: Minimal — 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused edge banding with hidden divider molding

divider_moldings: #302 — Hidden Divider Molding (Black)
#410 H — Divider Molding for use with marker boards, tack board, and specialty panels
edge_trim_options: #304-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #310EB / #310 (Combination)
systems.description: Progressive combination panel system. Horizontal panel edges use a hidden divider molding with 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused vinyl edge banding. Vertical panel edges use 0.018 inch flat edge banding with a minimal 1/16 inch wide visible divider molding. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.

reveals.horizontal: Hidden — 1/8 inch (3mm) radiused vinyl edge banding with concealed divider molding
reveals.vertical: 1/16 inch (1.5mm) visible divider molding with 0.018 inch flat edge banding

divider_moldings: #302 — Hidden Horizontal Divider Molding (Black)
#302a — 1/16 inch wide Vertical Divider Molding

systems.name: System #312
systems.description: Progressive panel system with an exposed divider molding creating a 1/2 inch (12mm) recessed channel reveal horizontally and vertically between edge banded panels. The reveal can be accented with a concave insert or HPL or veneer strips. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.
systems.edge_finish: 0.018 inch (0.5mm) PVC edge banding or wood veneer
systems.reveal_style: Recessed channel — can accept concave insert, HPL strip, or veneer strip accent
divider_moldings: #312 — 1/2 inch wide Recessed Channel Divider Molding
#312RI — Concave Reveal Insert (Optional)
edge_trim_options: #304-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #312 / #310 (Combination)
systems.description: Progressive combination panel system with an exposed 1/2 inch (12mm) recessed horizontal channel reveal and a 1/16 inch (1.5mm) vertical reveal between edge banded panels. The horizontal reveal can be accented with a concave insert or HPL or veneer strips. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.
systems.edge_finish: 0.018 inch (0.5mm) PVC edge banding or wood veneer
systems.reveal_style: Combination — wide recessed channel horizontal, narrow flat vertical
divider_moldings: #312 — 1/2 inch wide Horizontal Recessed Channel Divider Molding
#302a — 1/16 inch wide Vertical Divider Molding

systems.name: System #314
systems.description: Progressive panel system with an exposed divider molding creating a 1/4 inch (6mm) concave radiused reveal horizontally and vertically between edge banded panels. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.
systems.edge_finish: 0.018 inch (0.5mm) PVC edge banding or wood veneer
divider_moldings: #314 — 1/4 inch wide Concave Divider Molding
#410 H — Divider Molding for use with marker boards, tack board, and specialty panels
edge_trim_options: #304-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #410
systems.description: Progressive panel system with an exposed 1/2 inch (12mm) divider molding resting over the vertical and horizontal edges of panels. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.

reveals.horizontal: 1/2 inch (12mm) exposed molding covering panel edges
reveals.vertical: 1/2 inch (12mm) exposed molding covering panel edges

systems.reveal_style: Exposed overlay molding — molding rests over panel edges
divider_moldings: #410 H — 1/2 inch (12mm) wide face Divider Molding
#410a — 2-piece 1/2 inch wide face Divider Molding (for removable panels)

#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #412
systems.description: Non-progressive panel system with an exposed channel divider molding creating a 1 inch (25mm) horizontal and vertical reveal between panels. The 1/2 inch wide recessed channel in the molding center can accept flush or concave snap-in inserts or decorative strips of HPL or veneer. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.
systems.reveal_style: Wide exposed channel — accepts decorative inserts in center
divider_moldings: #412 — 1 inch wide Divider Molding with 1/2 inch recessed center channel for insert
#412 RI Flat — Flat Reveal Insert
#412 RI Concave — Concave Reveal Insert
edge_trim_options: #304-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner
#304-135 End Cap for 135 degree outside corner
#604-90 End Cap for 90 degree outside corner

systems.name: System #631
systems.description: Progressive panel system with a single rib divider molding creating a 1/4 inch (6mm) recessed reveal between edge banded panels horizontally and vertically. Recommended for vertical and horizontal installations.

systems.name: System #631 / #632 (Combination)
systems.description: Progressive combination panel system with a 1/4 inch (6mm) wide single rib molding running horizontally and a 1/2 inch (12mm) wide double ribbed molding running vertically between edge banded panels. Recommended for interior installations.
